name: a1_security_review
outcome_goal: Every high-trust seam has been reviewed via the security-review skill and every finding is either a dedupe-keyed bug or a decision.YYYY-MM-DD.security-review-ack-* row.
verify_command: bash -lc ". ./scripts/_workflow_env.sh && workflow_load_repo_env && praxis workflow bugs search security-review-$(date -I) --status OPEN --limit 25 --json | rg '\"bug_id\"' || psql "$WORKFLOW_DATABASE_URL" -tAc \"SELECT count(*) FROM operator_decisions WHERE decision_key LIKE 'decision.%.security-review-ack-%' AND effective_to IS NULL\" | rg -v '^0$'"

jobs.label: a1_security_review
jobs.prompt: Run the security-review skill against the high-trust seams. Targets: Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/sandbox_runtime.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/adapters/docker_runner.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/workflow/execution_backends.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/integrations/connector_executor.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/integrations/webhook.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/integration_manifest.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/api/operator_write.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/mcp/tools/operator.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/api/rest.py. File a canonical bug per finding with signature security-review-$(date -I)-<category>. If a seam is intentionally accepted, file operator_decisions key decision.2026-04-20.security-review-ack-<category>. Done when every category has either a bug or an ack decision. Transport constraint: use admitted CLI transport only; do not use llm_task, HTTP API routes, Anthropic routes, or deprecated Claude 4.6 slugs.
jobs.verify_command: bash -lc "praxis workflow bugs search security-review-$(date -I) --status OPEN --limit 25 --json | rg '\"bug_id\"' || psql "$WORKFLOW_DATABASE_URL" -tAc \"SELECT count(*) FROM operator_decisions WHERE decision_key LIKE 'decision.%.security-review-ack-%' AND effective_to IS NULL\" | rg -v '^0$'"
